# Code of conduct

TimeNest follows the [Contributor Covenant v2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/) in spirit:

- Be patient with beginners.
- Give feedback on code, not on people.
- Assume good faith.
- No harassment, no slurs, no politics in the tracker.

If someone crosses a line, email ceo@greycorelabs.com. Decisions are made by the maintainer and are final. Appeals are welcome but they go through the same mailbox, not through a public thread.
